regions.text: We put a bottle on a shelf. Which of these things may we put on a shelf: a book, a mountain, a cup, a box, a star, a clock, a horse, a distance, a plate, a carriage, a river, a house, a spoon, a garden?
We put potatoes in a pot. Which of these things may we put in a pot: water, windows, food, streets, tables, milk, soup, trains, salt, colors, eggs, wood, ideas?

We put money in our pockets. Which of these things may we put in our pockets: pipes, education, letters, pencils, offices, islands, maps, hands, governments, buttons, watches, distance, balls, roofs, knives?

We put our hats on. Which of these things may we put on: feet, boots, seats, gloves, shirts, walls, directions, coats, buildings, soap, scissors, collars, locks, socks, trousers, branches, trays, shoes, apples?
